results.rendered_html: ambu—prasāda, m. or ambu—prasādana, n. the clearing nut tree, Strychnos Potatorum (the nuts of this plant are generally used in India for purifying water [cf.  Mn. vi, 67 ]; they are rubbed upon the inner surface of a vessel, and so precipitate the impurities of the fluid it contains).
